name: ElevenLabs
description: Audio-creative reference — deep blacks anchor the canvas while electric glow accents (cyan + warm violet) suggest waveform energy. Technical-warm: serif display moments over geometric body type. Black is the medium; light is the message.

--color-obsidian-deep.role: Primary surface — page background, hero base, dark-mode default
--color-obsidian-deep.context: true black, the canvas everything glows against

--color-cloud-whisper.role: Primary text on black, CTA surface for inverted buttons

--color-shadow-surface.role: Elevated dark surface — card fills, modal backgrounds, audio-player chrome
--color-shadow-surface.context: slightly-lifted black, near-imperceptible step from obsidian-deep

--color-lagoon-glow.role: Signature accent — waveform highlights, key CTAs, link states

--color-violet-pulse.role: Secondary accent — gradient partner with lagoon-glow, hover states
--color-violet-pulse.context: warm violet, the human-warm counterweight to cyan

--color-graphite-body.role: Secondary text on black — captions, supporting copy
--color-graphite-body.context: mid-grey calibrated for legibility on true black

--color-ash-divider.role: Hairline dividers, low-emphasis borders on dark surfaces
--color-ash-divider.context: near-black with just enough lift to register

--font-display-instrument.role: Display headlines and editorial pull-quotes — the warm contrast moment against geometric body

--font-body-inter.role: Body copy, navigation, technical labels, UI chrome

antiPatterns: Never use --color-lagoon-glow and --color-violet-pulse simultaneously as solid blocks — they exist as gradient partners or paired-glow effects. Solid side-by-side reads as Twitch overlay, not audio brand.
Never set --color-obsidian-deep against --color-shadow-surface without a glow or divider — the contrast step is too subtle to register, the section will look broken.
Body type must NOT use --font-display-instrument — Instrument Serif at body sizes looks like a Substack draft. Reserve serif strictly for display moments and pull-quotes.
Never apply --color-graphite-body to white surfaces — this palette is dark-first. Light-mode adaptations must redefine the body color, not invert the dark-mode token.
